CodeBlockMethod.Name: SaveThenLoad
CodeBlockMethod.Code:
local data = _DataStorageService:GetGlobalDataStorage("DataTest") local position = self.Entity.TransformComponent.Position log(position) data:SetAsync("position", tostring(position), function(errorCode, key) if errorCode ~= 0 then log("저장 실패: " .. tostring(errorCode)) return end
log("저장 성공: " .. tostring(key))
data:GetAsync("position", function(loadErrorCode, loadKey, value) if loadErrorCode ~= 0 then log("불러오기 실패: " .. tostring(loadErrorCode)) return end
log("불러오기 성공: position = " .. tostring(loadKey) .. ", value = " .. tostring(value)) if tostring(value) == tostring(position) then log("확인 완료: 저장된 값과 불러온 값이 같습니다.") else log("확인 실패: 값이 다릅니다.") end end) end)

CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Name: HandleTriggerEnterEvent
CodeBlockEntityEventHandler.Code: local TriggerBodyEntity = event.TriggerBodyEntity if TriggerBodyEntity == _UserService.LocalPlayer then log("체크포인트 통과!") self:SaveThenLoad() end
